name: klassenraum.io
description: Klassenraum.io — multiplayer idle game set in one shared classroom

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@klassenraum/shared --if-present && npm run build --workspace=@klassenraum/client && npm run build --workspace=@klassenraum/server
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/client/tsconfig.json --noEmit
